scenarioName: Bluesky Keyword and Mention Alerts from a Persistent Apify Task

modules.capInvariant: This specification is intentionally non-paginated. The saved Task maxPostsPerRun must be no greater than 100 so the fixed retrieval limit of 100 returns every delivered post.

configuration.targetStructure: all Bluesky post fields required by module 7

routes.validPost: uri exists AND url exists AND isNew = true
routes.invalidPost: uri missing OR url missing OR isNew != true

modules.nativeIdempotency: Add/Replace with overwrite enabled leaves exactly one record for the stable key, including after an ambiguous retry.

modules.purpose: Credential-free diagnostic visible in Make execution history; end this branch successfully.
Report the non-success terminal status only after the committed post bundle has been idempotently persisted.
Report a non-success terminal run whose fetched dataset contains no rows; no destination write is attempted.
Report any terminal run without a defaultDatasetId and end safely without requesting dataset items.

terminalFailureRoute.datasetWithRows: module 10 runs after module 8 persisted the stable bluesky:<postUri> key
terminalFailureRoute.emptyDataset: module 11 reports the fetched zero-row dataset
terminalFailureRoute.missingDataset: module 12 does not request dataset items
terminalFailureRoute.then: end each instant-triggered branch successfully after exposing the terminal failure diagnostic; do not throw an error that could disable the scenario

errorHandlers.scenario: Set Store incomplete executions to Yes.

getDatasetItems.temporaryErrors: ConnectionError, RateLimitError, and ModuleTimeoutError use Make's automatic exponential-backoff schedule; other errors captured by Retry use the configured 3 attempts at 15-minute intervals.

destination.resumeAt: module 8 with the same post bundle
destination.requiredProof: Inject a timeout after the Data store commit, retry, and verify exactly one record exists for bluesky:postUri.

publicationGate: Build in a user-owned Make account, confirm saved Task maxPostsPerRun is no greater than 100 for the fixed non-paginated retrieval limit of 100, and set Store incomplete executions to Yes.

Run non-empty, quiet, invalid-post, FAILED, ABORTED, TIMED-OUT, missing-dataset-ID, dataset-retry, and Data-store-retry tests; inject a post-commit timeout and prove exactly one record exists for the stable key.
Export and scrub the candidate blueprint.
Import that exact file into a fresh empty validation organization/team or clean account.
Reconnect credentials, save and activate the scenario, and verify Make recreated the Task-scoped Watch Task Runs webhook.

Repeat non-empty, quiet, invalid-post, FAILED, ABORTED, TIMED-OUT, missing-dataset-ID, dataset-retry, and Data-store-retry tests after exact-file import, including exactly one record after a post-commit timeout.
Obtain independent validator PASS and separate adversarial PASS before publication.
